description: As part of a corporate sustainability initiative, create a custom Life Cycle Impact Assessment (LCIA) method in openLCA named 'Corporate Shadow Price 2026' featuring a 'Carbon Liability (USD)' category. This method must implement a carbon tax of $100.00 USD per metric tonne of CO2-equivalent, with characterization factors for 'Carbon dioxide' (emission to air) and 'Methane' (emission to air, GWP of 25). Using the USLCI database (located at ~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip), generate a product system for 'Electricity, bituminous coal, at power plant' (or similar coal electricity process) and export the LCIA results calculated with your custom method to ~/LCA_Results/shadow_price_result.csv.
